title: Finn's Citizens
description: A mod with the goal to provide simple life to fill an otherwise empty world.
body:
Do you feel like your towns are empty in your minecarft world? DO minecraft villagers not fit the aesetic or lore of your world? Well Finn's Citizens may be right for you!

Finn's Citizens aims to be able to create citizens and people to populate your world and have the appearence of living breathing cities, without the lag or hassle that villagers give and at a greater variety!

Currently Included!
- Gnorme
  A grumpy bald gnome! He can defend himself!
  Simply just craft an egg and redstone and you will gain his spawn egg to place anywhere!

**Coming Soon**
- _The Tiefling in the icon
- More Fantasy Races!
    Such as....
    - Dwarves
    - Elves
    - Tieflings
    - Lizardfolk
    - And More..._


 **Down the road!**
- 3_0+ variations on every species  
- Custom animations
- Anchors! When linked with a citizen it will keep them in that area!_

Any feedback is welcome!

ANy contributers would be amazing especially coders! I do not have much coding experience, just a lot as a digital artist so modeling and texturing is my jam!
